hero.name: Emad Askareimotlagh
hero.tagline: I build sustainable, high-quality digital solutions — from requirements analysis to final delivery.

about.title: About me
about.subtitle: Systems and web developer with a broad technical foundation
about.paragraph1: I have 3 years of professional experience in systems and web development, but have been programming long before that, giving me a stable and broad technical foundation. Although I am sometimes formally categorized as junior, my practical experience and problem-solving ability are closer to a more senior level.
about.paragraph2: I have worked both in Sweden and in international, distributed teams and am used to taking responsibility for the entire development chain — from requirements analysis to final delivery.
about.paragraph3: I thrive in collaborative environments where clear communication, knowledge sharing, and quality are in focus. As a person, I am curious, solution-oriented, and ambitious, with a good sense of humor and strong commitment to what I build.

skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: Technical breadth across the entire development chain

frontend.title: Frontend
frontend.description: React, Next.js, Vue, TypeScript, and modern UI/UX principles for responsive, accessible interfaces.

backend.title: Backend
backend.description: Node.js, Express, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, and RESTful APIs with focus on scalability and maintainability.

mobile.title: Mobile
mobile.description: React Native and Flutter for cross-platform apps with strong user experience.

practices.title: Practices
practices.description: Agile workflows, Cypress testing, real-time solutions via WebSockets, and CI/CD.

experience.title: Experience
experience.subtitle: The full chain — from idea to production

items.title: Full-stack development
items.description: Responsibility for the entire development chain — from requirements analysis and architecture to implementation and delivery.

items.title: International teams
items.description: Experience with distributed teams in Sweden and abroad with clear communication and knowledge sharing.

items.title: Problem solving
items.description: Practical experience and problem-solving ability that exceeds typical junior level.

projects.title: Selected projects
projects.subtitle: A selection of previous work reflecting my technical breadth

items.title: LPE Timetrack
items.description: Participated in Laggelee AB's LPE project. Designed and built the entire solution — Flutter app and web platform, now live. Users can create tasks and projects, register work time, and log leave such as parental leave, vacation, and sick leave.

items.title: SecuroPortal
items.description: Developed approximately 90% of the code and planning for Scopeworks AB. A complex platform where sub-customers can split and share parking areas and get paid via Fortnox invoices or Stripe.

items.title: Prevent
items.description: Contributed to a React Native app for parking attendants to register license plate numbers in the field.

items.title: Foodieexpress
items.description: E-commerce platform for candy sales with modern checkout and payment integration.

items.title: Göteburgare Grill & Bar
items.description: Restaurant website with online vegan food booking, catering, lunch menu, and restaurant information. Modern, user-friendly design for a Gothenburg-based grill & bar.

items.title: Anbar – Warehouse Management
items.description: Storage and inventory management system for a furniture company in Iran. React web app with a .NET backend for product management, stock levels, inbound/outbound logistics, and reporting.
